input_sequence.description: Send QUORUM_START event to machine in IDLE state
Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in IDLE state
Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in IDLE state

assertions: Machine transitions to exactly IDLE, not any other state

input_sequence.description: Send DECIDE event to machine in IDLE state
Send DECIDE event to machine in IDLE state

assertions: Machine remains in IDLE; event DECIDE is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in IDLE state
Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in IDLE state

assertions: Machine remains in IDLE; event VOTES_COLLECTED is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send QUORUM_START event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state
Send QUORUM_START event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state

assertions: Machine remains in COLLECTING_VOTES; event QUORUM_START is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state
Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state

assertions: Machine remains in COLLECTING_VOTES; event CIRCUIT_BREAK is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state

assertions: Machine transitions to exactly COLLECTING_VOTES, not any other state

input_sequence.description: Send DECIDE event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state
Send DECIDE event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state

assertions: Machine remains in COLLECTING_VOTES; event DECIDE is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state
Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in COLLECTING_VOTES state

assertions: Machine transitions to exactly DELIBERATING, not any other state

input_sequence.description: Send DECIDE event to machine in DELIBERATING state
Send DECIDE event to machine in DELIBERATING state

assertions: Machine transitions to exactly DECIDED, not any other state

input_sequence.description: Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in DELIBERATING state
Send QUORUM_START event to machine in DELIBERATING state
Send QUORUM_START event to machine in DELIBERATING state

assertions: Machine remains in DELIBERATING; event QUORUM_START is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in DELIBERATING state
Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in DELIBERATING state

assertions: Machine remains in DELIBERATING; event CIRCUIT_BREAK is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in DELIBERATING state

assertions: Machine transitions to exactly DELIBERATING, not any other state

input_sequence.description: Send DECIDE event to machine in DECIDED state
Send DECIDE event to machine in DECIDED state

assertions: Machine remains in DECIDED; event DECIDE is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in DECIDED state
Send CIRCUIT_BREAK event to machine in DECIDED state

assertions: Machine remains in DECIDED; event CIRCUIT_BREAK is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send QUORUM_START event to machine in DECIDED state
Send QUORUM_START event to machine in DECIDED state

assertions: Machine remains in DECIDED; event QUORUM_START is rejected

input_sequence.description: Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in DECIDED state
Send VOTES_COLLECTED event to machine in DECIDED state

assertions: Machine remains in DECIDED; event VOTES_COLLECTED is rejected
